fixed.title: Reference stable
fixed.message: Electrical readings remain within expected baseline tolerance.

conventional.title: High movement activity
conventional.message: Tracker has executed 14 adjustments today, increasing actuation energy draw.

ann.title: Adaptive mode nominal
ann.message: Prediction confidence remains above 90% and movement throttling is active.

ann.title: Cloud disturbance detected
ann.message: Transient cloud edge was observed, but predicted gain stayed too low to trigger a motor step.

ann.title: Abnormal power output guard
ann.message: No anomaly confirmed. The guard remains armed because actual output dipped 1.8% below forecast for one cycle.
